personal_info.name: Jatin Rajani
personal_info.title: Applied AI & Cloud-Native Full Stack Engineer

professional_summary: Cloud-Native Full Stack and Applied AI Developer with hands-on internship experience building production-grade systems across frontend experiences, backend APIs, multimodal deep learning, and Advanced RAG pipelines. Seeking roles in AI/ML or Full Stack Development to contribute to real-world systems from day one.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

professional_experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
professional_experience.description: Engineered a Hybrid Graph and Vector RAG chatbot from scratch, combining BM25 sparse retrieval with dense vector search, and utilizing hierarchical chunking to process unstructured data into JSON. Achieved 95% retrieval accuracy and 35ms latency by integrating advanced NLP pipelines--including intent detection, query rewriting, and crossencoder reranking.

professional_experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
professional_experience.description: Optimized an existing platform's overall performance by 30% by enhancing frontend responsiveness, refactoring 5+ core CRUD workflows and slashing authentication latency to less than 200ms. Additionally, crafted an immersive 3D website from scratch using React and Three.js, seamlessly integrating 3+ custom Blender models.

technical_projects.name: NexusMind
technical_projects.subtitle: Enterprise Agentic RAG Platform
technical_projects.description: Architected a multi-tenant, no-code platform for building custom Hybrid RAG agents with configurable agent personas, system prompts, and isolated knowledge bases per tenant. Designed a multimodal ingestion pipeline that transforms unstructured PDFs, images, and documents into searchable graph and vector knowledge bases, and implemented LangGraph-based orchestration with intelligent retrieval routing, fault-tolerant model fallbacks, and real-time monitoring across 3+ supported LLM providers.

technical_projects.name: MHPCD
technical_projects.subtitle: Multimodal Hinglish Predatory Comment Detector
technical_projects.description: Constructed an AI-powered moderation system for context-aware detection of predatory and abusive behavior in Indian social media, building a custom dataset from scratch by scraping 50,000+ Hinglish comments and 15,000+ images. Architected a multimodal fusion pipeline utilizing SigLIP and BGE-M3 encoders with cross-modal attention to jointly analyze images and text, with a FastAPI backend delivering sub-second moderation inference.

technical_projects.name: Chronexis
technical_projects.subtitle: Automated Timetable Generation System
technical_projects.description: Formulated a constraint-based timetable generation system leveraging CP-SAT, capable of scheduling 5,000+ slots at once, handling 100+ rooms and 100+ faculty members simultaneously, generating large institutional timetables in under 5 minutes and smaller ones in under 2 minutes. Integrated drag-and-drop editing, real-time conflict detection, Excel import/export, and multi-perspective views for students, teachers, and rooms with full history tracking.

technical_projects.name: Astika
technical_projects.subtitle: Vedic Astrology Intelligence Platform
technical_projects.description: Orchestrated a full-stack Vedic astrology platform featuring 50+ deterministic engines for high-precision, location based calculations across rashi, nakshatra, transits, dosha and yoga detection, dasha timelines, guna milan, and divisional charts. Delivered structured insights and daily predictions across career, health, personality & relationships. Integrated an intent-aware chatbot for natural language query handling backed by strict rule-based accuracy

ai_machine_learning: RAG (Naive, Advanced, Hybrid, Graph, Multimodal, Self-Reflective)

key_achievements: Achieved 95% retrieval accuracy and 35ms latency in RAG chatbot implementation
Optimized platform performance by 30% and reduced authentication latency to <200ms
Built multimodal AI system processing 50,000+ Hinglish comments and 15,000+ images
Created timetable system handling 5,000+ slots, 100+ rooms, 100+ faculty simultaneously
Designed and deployed multi-tenant enterprise RAG platform with 3+ LLM provider support

faq.What is your main area of expertise?: I specialize in Applied AI and Full Stack Development, with particular expertise in RAG pipelines, multimodal AI systems, and cloud-native architecture. My recent work includes building enterprise-grade RAG platforms and AI-powered moderation systems.
faq.What RAG variations have you worked with: I've worked with Naive RAG, Advanced RAG, Hybrid RAG (combining BM25 and vector search), Graph-based RAG, Multimodal RAG, and Self-Reflective RAG. I have hands-on experience with hierarchical chunking, intent detection, query rewriting, and crossencoder reranking.
faq.Tell me about your NexusMind project: NexusMind is a multi-tenant, no-code platform for building custom Hybrid RAG agents. It features configurable agent personas, isolated knowledge bases per tenant, multimodal ingestion (PDFs, images, documents), graph and vector knowledge bases, LangGraph-based orchestration, and support for 3+ LLM providers with fault tolerance.
faq.What's the MHPCD project about?: MHPCD is a Multimodal Hinglish Predatory Comment Detector - an AI moderation system for Indian social media. It uses a custom dataset of 50,000+ Hinglish comments and 15,000+ images, with SigLIP and BGE-M3 encoders for multimodal analysis, achieving sub-second inference.
faq.Describe your Chronexis project: Chronexis is an automated timetable generation system using Google OR-Tools CP-SAT. It can handle 5,000+ slots, 100+ rooms, and 100+ faculty simultaneously. Features include drag-and-drop editing, real-time conflict detection, Excel import/export, and generates institutional timetables in under 5 minutes.
faq.What was your experience at ShunyaTech?: At ShunyaTech, I engineered a Hybrid Graph and Vector RAG chatbot combining BM25 sparse retrieval with dense vector search. I achieved 95% retrieval accuracy and 35ms latency using hierarchical chunking, intent detection, query rewriting, and crossencoder reranking.
faq.What did you do at MultiForgeX?: At MultiForgeX, I optimized platform performance by 30%, enhanced frontend responsiveness, refactored 5+ core CRUD workflows, and reduced authentication latency to under 200ms. I also built an immersive 3D website using React and Three.js with 3+ custom Blender models.
faq.What's your experience with multimodal A: I have extensive multimodal experience including SigLIP and BGE-M3 encoders, cross-modal attention mechanisms, and fusion pipelines. I've built systems that jointly analyze images and text for AI moderation and detection tasks.
faq.Which cloud platforms have you used?: I've worked with AWS, Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment on Vercel, Render, and Netlify. I have hands-on experience with cloud-native architecture and DevOps practices.
faq.What LLM frameworks do you know?: I work with LangGraph for orchestration, have experience with LLM fine-tuning, and support multiple LLM providers. I've implemented fault-tolerant model fallbacks in production systems.
